hero.name: Mohammad Ameenuddin
hero.tagline: Turning raw data into decisions. I build dashboards and analytical systems that go beyond charts — measuring performance, surfacing risks, and unlocking growth.
hero.availability: Open to Data Analyst / BI Developer roles

about: I'm a Data Analyst passionate about transforming raw data into meaningful business insights. I specialize in building dashboards and analytical solutions that focus on decision-making, performance tracking, and identifying growth opportunities. Strong foundation in SQL, Power BI, and Excel — with experience analyzing end-to-end business processes and delivering insights, not just charts.

bullets: Analyzed banking datasets to identify trends and improve data-driven decision-making.
Cleaned and transformed large datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy).
Wrote optimized SQL queries to extract and manipulate data efficiently.
Built interactive Power BI dashboards to visualize KPIs and operational metrics.
A/B testing analysis contributing to ~17% engagement improvement.
Resolved complex technical issues for global users across digital platforms.
Improved CSAT through efficient troubleshooting and clear communication.
Analyzed recurring issues and contributed to process improvements.
Provided real-time customer support resolving order and platform issues.
Maintained high response-time and satisfaction metrics.

experience.role: Senior Escalation Associate — Axis Bank Process
bullets: Handled critical banking escalations ensuring compliance and accuracy.
Conducted root-cause analysis for recurring issues.
Managed high-impact cases under strict SLA requirements.

projects.title: Loan Analysis Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Power BI · End-to-end loan lifecycle
projects.description: Built a Power BI dashboard analyzing the complete loan lifecycle — from application to recovery — across channels and products.
highlights: Only 53% recovery rate — flagged as major risk area
Online channel leads at 36% of acquisitions

projects.title: Sales Performance Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Looker Studio · DMart sales analytics
projects.description: Interactive Looker Studio report converting raw datasets into structured, decision-ready insights with dynamic filters and drill-downs.
highlights: End-to-end KPI monitoring with auto refresh
Trend & variance analysis with comparative views

projects.title: Supply Chain Analytics
projects.subtitle: Power BI · Inventory & vendor performance
projects.description: End-to-end Power BI dashboard tracking inventory turnover, vendor efficiency, and order fulfilment in a single live view.
highlights: Dynamic KPIs via DAX (turnover, stock-out, fulfilment)
Power Query transformations for clean modeling
Drill-down vendor reports for fast triage

projects.title: Movie Analytics — RSVP Movies
projects.subtitle: SQL · Three-year global release study
projects.description: Advanced SQL analysis on three years of movie data to inform a production company's global release strategy.

projects.title: IPL Visualization Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Tableau · 10 seasons of IPL cricket
projects.description: Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing IPL match, player and team statistics from 2008-2017 using match and ball-by-ball data.
highlights: Orange & Purple Cap trends across seasons

projects.title: Bank Marketing Analysis
projects.subtitle: Excel · Conditional formatting + Pivots
projects.description: Analyzed bank marketing data using advanced Excel — Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP, conditional formatting and macros to automate reporting.
highlights: Customer trend report delivered to stakeholders
